column1: select * from (select x.WdID x_WdID, x.Wd x_Wd, x.SID x_SID, x.SoundFile x_SoundFile, x.Ex x_Ex, x.IPA x_IPA, x.Trs x_Trs, hx.Ex hxEx from examples as x left join headword_exs as hx on x_Ex = hx.Ex and x_WdID = hx.WdID) where x_Ex is not null and hxEx is null order by x_WdID asc, x_SID asc;
